name: Perplexity
description: Have Perplexity AI search answers read aloud so you can absorb information while doing other things.
metaDescription: Listen to Perplexity AI answers with Voq — free text-to-speech Chrome extension with multilingual support and word highlighting.
steps: Install Voq from the Chrome Web Store for free.
Visit perplexity.ai and search for anything.
Select the answer text or a specific section you want to hear.
Click the Voq toolbar icon or right-click and choose 'Read with Voq'.
Voq reads the text aloud with word-by-word highlighting in its reading panel.
Use the controls to pause, rewind, or change the speaking rate.
